description_long: This is a large, ornate wardrobe with three tall, panelled doors, each featuring elegant, curved moldings and decorative carvings at the top and bottom. The wardrobe is finished in a uniform light gray color, giving it a classic and refined appearance. The top of the wardrobe has a prominent, arched crown with intricate detailing, adding to its traditional European style. The side panels are plain but framed with subtle molding, while the base stands on four short, curved legs. Small, curved handles are visible on each door, suggesting easy access to the interior. The back is flat and unadorned, indicating it is designed to be placed against a wall.
description: A large, ornate, light gray wardrobe with three panelled doors, decorative carvings, and curved handles. It features an arched crown and stands on four short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three panelled doors with ornate moldings, decorative carvings, and curved handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, framed panel and the depth of the wardrobe.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, unadorned back panel with a slight arch at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain, framed side panel.
